title: Phan Bo Giam Gia Hoa Don Vao Tung Hang Hoa
module: Bao cao ban hang theo hang hoa
author: Product Team
context: Khi thu ngan giam gia tay tren toan bo hoa don (vi du: hoa don 500,000d -> giam 100,000d), he thong can phan bo khoan giam nay xuong tung dong hang hoa theo ty le gia tri.

userStory.iWant: He thong tu dong phan bo khoan giam gia tay tren hoa don xuong tung dong hang hoa theo ty le gia tri cua moi item
userStory.soThat: Bao cao hang hoa hien thi dung Doanh thu thuan va Chenh lech cho tung san pham

example.description: Hoa don goc: 3 items, tong 500,000d, thu ngan giam tay 100,000d

acceptanceCriteria.title: Phan bo dung theo ty le
acceptanceCriteria.given: Mot hoa don co N items, tong gia tri T, thu ngan giam tay D
acceptanceCriteria.when: Hoa don duoc hoan thanh (trang thai: Hoan thanh)
acceptanceCriteria.then: Moi item[i] duoc gan discount_allocated[i] = D x (line_total[i] / T). Dung Largest Remainder Method de lam tron. SUM(discount_allocated) = D

acceptanceCriteria.title: Hien thi tren Bao cao hang hoa
acceptanceCriteria.given: Bao cao Ban hang theo hang hoa duoc mo
acceptanceCriteria.when: Co hoa don giam gia tay trong ky
acceptanceCriteria.then: Moi dong giao dich hien thi: Gia tri niem yet, Doanh thu thuan, Chenh lech (mau do neu am)

acceptanceCriteria.title: Ghi chu nguon giam
acceptanceCriteria.given: Hoa don co giam gia tay
acceptanceCriteria.then: Footer ghi ro: (Da phan bo giam gia hoa don, giam gia phieu tra)

flow:
[THU NGAN]
    |
    v
Tao order -> Them items vao hoa don
    |
    v
Ap dung giam gia tay
    |
    v
Hoan thanh thanh toan
    |
    v
--- TRIGGER: On Invoice Complete ---
    |
    v
[BACKEND - Discount Allocation Service]
    |- Lay invoice.discount_amount (D)
    |- Lay danh sach line_items[]
    |- Tinh total = SUM(line_total[i])
    |- FOR each item[i]: allocated[i] = FLOOR(D x line_total[i] / total)
    |- Largest Remainder cho phan du
    L- SUM CHECK: SUM(allocated) == D

edgeCases.handle: Toan bo giam gia ve item do
Validate: khong cho giam vuot tong
Bo qua item do trong phan bo

notes: Khong tinh lai discount_allocated khi chi xem bao cao
Neu hoa don bi sua lai sau hoan thanh -> trigger tinh lai phan bo
Log moi truong hop SUM(allocated) != D de debug
Don vi tinh: VND nguyen (integer), khong dung float

days.result: Flow HTML + Test case + AC da duoc team thong nhat

tasks.text: Tao user story US-001 voi mo ta day du context va business logic
Claude sinh acceptance criteria cho 6 truong hop (AC-01 den AC-06)
Claude sinh danh sach test case bao gom happy path, edge cases, rounding
Hop team: PO duyet business logic phan bo giam gia, Tech Lead duyet thuat toan Largest Remainder
Neu chua dat -> chinh sua AC va flow theo gop y, duyet lai trong ngay

days.theme: Phan ra task & Bat dau code
days.result: Nhanh feature da tao. Migration DB da chay. Skeleton Discount Allocation Service da co.

tasks.text: git pull origin develop ve nhanh feature/discount-allocation
Tao nhanh: feature/invoice-discount-allocation
Viet migration: ALTER TABLE order_items ADD COLUMN discount_allocated, net_revenue
Tao DiscountAllocationService skeleton voi interface ro rang
Viet unit test cho ham tinh ty le (exact ratio) truoc khi code

days.theme: Code chinh - Thuat toan phan bo
days.result: Hoan thanh 60% logic chinh. Thuat toan Largest Remainder da co unit test xanh.

tasks.text: git pull origin develop - kiem tra conflict
Code ham allocateDiscount(invoiceDiscount, lineItems): allocated[]
Code Largest Remainder: FLOOR tung item, phan chia phan du cho top items theo fractional DESC
Claude test tung ham: kiem tra SUM(allocated) == D voi nhieu bo du lieu
Code trigger On Invoice Complete: goi allocateDiscount va luu vao DB
Cuoi ngay: commit va push len nhanh feature

days.theme: Code chinh (phan 2) + Tu QA toan bo
days.result: Feature hoan thanh 100%. Toan bo test case da dat. Bao cao QA da xuat.

tasks.text: git pull origin develop - cap nhat code moi tu develop
Code query bao cao: JOIN order_items + orders, GROUP BY product_id
Hien thi 3 cot bao cao: Gia tri niem yet / Doanh thu thuan / Chenh lech (do neu am)
Xu ly AC-04: giam gia phan bo tinh tren gia sau khi da giam truc tiep
Xu ly AC-05: khong an cot Chenh lech khi D=0
Claude chay toan bo test case (AC-01 den AC-06 + 4 edge cases) - xuat bao cao ket qua
Neu co loi -> sua ngay, chay lai test den khi xanh het

days.theme: Phan tich anh huong + Code review
days.result: Code da review xong. Bao cao anh huong da co. San sang merge.

tasks.text: git pull origin develop - lan cuoi truoc khi review
Claude phan tich anh huong: feature nay anh huong Bao cao doanh thu, Bao cao doi soat, API xuat bao cao?
Claude xuat bao cao anh huong + danh sach regression test cu the cho tung module bi anh huong
Dev chay regression test theo de xuat: Bao cao doanh thu, Hoa don co giam gia item-level
Tech Lead review code: kiem tra thuat toan Largest Remainder, DB migration, query bao cao
Neu co gop y -> sua trong ngay, chay lai test

days.result: Release beta thanh cong. Migration DB da chay. Tai lieu da cap nhat. Sprint hoan thanh!

tasks.text: Pull code moi nhat tu develop -> giai quyet conflict cuoi cung
Chay lai toan bo test case lan cuoi sau khi merge develop vao feature
Neu dat het -> merge feature/invoice-discount-allocation vao develop
Chay DB migration tren moi truong beta
Claude tao release note: mo ta tinh nang, cach tinh phan bo, edge cases da xu ly
Deploy ban beta tu nhanh develop
Neu co loi sau deploy -> hotfix ngay tren develop
